title: Senior Instructional Designer at Udemy India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at Udemy India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
We at Udemy India Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Instructional Designer based out of Dhanbad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Udemy India Asia Pacific Associates:
Udemy India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Udemy India Asia Pacific Associates!
